---
title : "Stability and Comparability of Meritocratic Beliefs in School-Age Students: A Measurement Invariance Approach across Time and Cohorts"
date : "2024-01-01"
author : "Castillo, Juan Carlos; Laffert, Andreas; Carrasco, Kevin; Zavala, Benjamin & Diaz, Jesus"
categories : ["Presentation"]
publication : " XI International Conference COES . Chile"
publication_short : " XI International Conference COES . Chile"
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
---
<iframe
src="https://educacion-meritocracia.github.io/merit-factorial/presentations/COES_2024.html"
title="Xaringan presentation"
style="width: 100%; max-width: 100%; height: 450px; border: 0;"
allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture"
allowfullscreen>
</iframe>


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Castillo, Juan Carlos; Laffert, Andreas; Carrasco, Kevin; Zavala, Benjamin & Diaz, Jesus (2024). *Stability and Comparability of Meritocratic Beliefs in School-Age Students: A Measurement Invariance Approach across Time and Cohorts*.  XI International Conference COES . Chile

:::
